Interface Rebindable

All Known Subinterfaces:
ResourceHandle
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAiProvider, AbstractAsiContainer, AbstractBrowser, AbstractMessage, AbstractModelMessage, AbstractPart, AbstractProjectContextProvider, AbstractResourceHandle, AbstractSwingAsiContainer, AbstractTool, AbstractToolCall, AbstractToolResponse, Agi, AgiConfig, AgiUserMessage, AnahataToolkit, AnthropicMessage, AnthropicProvider, AsiContainer, AsiContainerPreferences, AsiDesktopAgiConfig, AsiDesktopAsiContainer, Audio, BadTool, BadToolCall, BadToolResponse, BasicContextProvider, BasicPropertyChangeSource, BatchCodeRefiner, BlobPart, Chrome, CodeModel, CodeRefiner, ContextManager, ContextWindowGarbageCollector, Editor, Firefox, GeminiAiProvider, GeminiGoogleCloudExpressAIProvider, GeminiModelMessage, Hints, History, Host, HostedCodeExecutionCallPart, HostedCodeExecutionResultPart, HuggingFaceProvider, IDE, InputUserMessage, Java, JavaMethodTool, JavaMethodToolCall, JavaMethodToolResponse, JavaObjectToolkit, Maven, MinimaxAnthropicProvider, ModalProvider, ModelBlobPart, ModelTextPart, NbHandle, NbJava, NetBeansAgiConfig, NetBeansAsiContainer, OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider, OpenAiCompatibleMessage, OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage, OpenAiModelMessage, OpenAiResponsesProvider, OpenTopComponentsContextProvider, OutputTabsContextProvider, PathHandle, ProjectAlertsContextProvider, ProjectContextProvider, ProjectFilesContextProvider, Projects, ProjectStructureContextProvider, Radio, RagMessage, Refactor, RequestConfig, Resource, ResourceManager, Resources, Screens, Session, Shell, Speech, StatusManager, StringHandle, SwingAgiConfig, SwingJava, SwingTaskManager, TextPart, TextView, TextViewportSettings, ToolManager, UrlHandle, UserBlobPart, UserMessage, UserTextPart, WebSearchCallPart
public interface Rebindable
An interface for objects that require re-initialization after being deserialized (e.g., to restore transient fields like listeners or locks).
Author:
anahata

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    rebind()
    Re-initializes the object's state after deserialization.

  • Method Details

    • rebind

      void rebind()
      Re-initializes the object's state after deserialization.
